name: Long March 5
description: Long March 5 (Chang Zheng 5) is China's heaviest-lift launch vehicle, developed by CASC and operated from Wenchang. It uses liquid hydrogen/liquid oxygen on the core and YF-100K kerosene/LOX engines on the four boosters, and has launched China's space-station modules, the Tianwen-1 Mars mission, and lunar sample return missions.
